title: lastrea pedata
intro: Lastrea pedata, also known as the Lady fern or Mountain fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lastrea pedata are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Lastrea pedata can be prepared as a herbal remedy through tea infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, making it a valuable addition to holistic health practices.
